Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiffs Parkmerced Owner is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney Daniel Stern for the plaintiff.
Defendants Regan Gunawan, Andy Wijawa, Billie Billie, I made Putra are present.
Attorney Herman Hoying appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Feb 01, 2016 is vacated. (501/jpt)
